backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functionality defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the white text color implementation for ENZOxSENSI title in App.tsx header component.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing authentication flow, sensitivity generation, and styling architecture.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for background, foreground, accent, and UI component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with ENZOxSENSI title and root div mounting the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component managing authentication state, screen transitions between passkey/device name entry, and sensitivity popup display with white-text header branding and footer.
frontend/src/components/DeviceNameScreen: Device name input form with validation, 100% headshot rate badge, and Generate button that triggers Brazilian sensitivity popup.
frontend/src/components/PasskeyScreen.ts: Passkey authentication screen with client-side validation for 'enzonvrfall' passkey and Instagram follow note.
frontend/src/components/SensitivityPopup: Modal dialog generating and displaying random Brazilian sensitivity values (General, Red Dot, 2x, 4x: 50-200) using useMemo with isOpen dependency for fresh values on each open.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing ICP backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication with AuthClient integration, login/logout state management, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file as the application uses only client-side logic with no backend queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color variables for UI components (background, foreground, primary, secondary, sidebar, etc.) using OKLCH color space, plus base styling for body and headings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root render with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then mounts the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors mapped to CSS variables (using OKLCH), custom border radius values, box shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing ENZOxSENSI, a mobile app with passkey authentication ('enzonvrfall') that generates random Brazilian sensitivity settings for gaming devices, with architectural notes about client-side validation, instant transitions, and sensitivity value constraints (max 200).
